case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. SCOTT M MCDERMOTT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M $1,726.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,771.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.95) SERVED MAY-21-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, OFFICIAL NOTIFICATION OF DEFENANT'S ADDRESS CHANGE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,726.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT [($45.95 CREDIT = $38.84(APPLIED TO INTEREST)+ $7.11(APPLIED TO PRINCIPAL)], $45.95 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,765.74 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCDERMOTT, SCOTT M $1,764.84 PRINCIPAL, $1,765.74 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,530.58, (PRINCIPAL INCLUDES $7.11 CREDIT;INTEREST INCLUDES 38.84 CREDIT)
